to know his biological father.

source_metadata.title: 2025/02/13 -Petitions
source_metadata.description:
Petition of Barbara Kuriger MP: Open up Ruffell Road in Te Kowhai; Petition of Alistair Reese: Recognise oral agreement as part of the Treaty of Waitangi; Petition of Laura Ancell: Allow children of parents born out of wedlock to apply for citizenship

Hearing of Evidence: 

Petition of Barbara Kuriger MP

Barbara Kuriger MP


Petition of Alistair Reese

Sir Geoffrey Palmer


Petition of Laura Ancell

Laura Ancell

Department of Internal Affairs:

Julia Taylor, Manager Operational Policy and Official Correspondence;
Rachel Prosser, Principal Advisor (Service Delivery and Operations);
Clare O’Connor, Principal Solicitor; 
Shiyi Redpath, Senior Policy Analyst (Regulation and Policy)
